features: Instant Pain Relief: Cushions and protects blisters, instantly relieving pain and pressure, making it perfect for use on feet, hands, and other affected areas.
Long-Lasting Adhesion: Stays securely in place for up to 7 days, even through showers and physical activities, ensuring continuous protection and comfort.
Transparent and Discreet: Virtually invisible design blends seamlessly with your skin, allowing you to wear them confidently with any footwear or outfit.
Hypoallergenic and Breathable: Made with skin-friendly materials that allow air to circulate while protecting the blister, preventing further irritation and promoting faster healing.
Easy to Apply and Remove: Simple application and removal process ensures that the plaster stays in place without causing additional discomfort or damage to the skin.
description: Product Description Introducing Proplast Blister Plasters, your ultimate solution for fast and effective blister relief. Designed to cushion and protect, these plasters instantly alleviate pain and pressure on blisters, making them ideal for use on feet, hands, and other affected areas. With long-lasting adhesion, they stay securely in place for up to 7 days, even through showers and vigorous activities. The transparent, virtually invisible design blends seamlessly with your skin, allowing you to wear them confidently with any footwear or outfit. Made from hypoallergenic and breathable materials, Proplast Blister Plasters promote faster healing while preventing further irritation. Easy to apply and remove, these plasters ensure continuous comfort and protection, making them an essential addition to your first aid kit. Directions [INFERRED] Apply the plaster directly to the blister to protect it, relieve pain, and promote healing. Legal Disclaimer This pack of Blister Plasters contains thirty individual plasters that are flexible and comfortable, and offers protection against irritation to blisters and infection to open wounds. Each individually wrapped blister plaster is durable, waterproof and breathable. See more
